name: @joehe71/office-tools
description: Office tools for Finch — read, create, edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files using OfficeCLI.

finch.name: Office Tools
finch.description: Office tools for Finch — read, create, edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files using OfficeCLI.
finch.systemPrompt:
When the user needs to work with Office documents (Word .docx, Excel .xlsx, PowerPoint .pptx), prefer the Office Tools extension. It wraps OfficeCLI — a single-binary Office suite for AI agents.

Strategy: L1 (read & inspect) → L2 (edit). Start with `read_office_file` to understand structure, then use `modify_office_file` to make changes. When unsure about property names or syntax, use `inspect_office_file` with a help query instead of guessing.

Setup: If OfficeCLI is not installed, call `setup_officecli` to download and install it automatically. This is a one-time setup. If `check_officecli` shows OfficeCLI is not available, always suggest calling `setup_officecli` first.

Live preview rules:
- PowerPoint (.pptx): ALWAYS start a live preview (`preview_office_file(action=start)`) when creating or editing a PPT. PPT is a visual medium — the user needs to see the result in real time. After each `modify_office_file` call, the browser auto-refreshes. When the user clicks an element in the browser, use `preview_office_file(action=selected)` to inspect it.
- Word (.docx) and Excel (.xlsx): Do NOT auto-start preview. Instead, ask the user: 'Would you like a live preview so you can click on elements to inspect them?' If yes, start preview. If no, continue without.
- When done with all edits and the user no longer needs preview, call `preview_office_file(action=stop)` to shut down the server.

promptGuides.title: Set up OfficeCLI
promptGuides.description: Check and install OfficeCLI if needed.
promptGuides.prompt: Check if OfficeCLI is installed using check_officecli. If not installed, call setup_officecli to download and install it.

promptGuides.title: Look up OfficeCLI help
promptGuides.description: Query OfficeCLI help for property syntax.
promptGuides.prompt: Look up how to add a chart to a PowerPoint slide using OfficeCLI help.

promptGuides.title: Read a Word document
promptGuides.description: Read a .docx file and display its structure.
promptGuides.prompt: Read outline.docx and show me the document structure in outline view. Then start a live preview so I can click on paragraphs and tables to inspect them.

promptGuides.title: Read a PowerPoint
promptGuides.description: Read a .pptx file and display its structure.
promptGuides.prompt: Read deck.pptx and show me the slide outline. Then start a live preview so I can click on elements.

promptGuides.title: Read an Excel file
promptGuides.description: Read a .xlsx file and display its structure.
promptGuides.prompt: Read data.xlsx and show me the outline. Then start a live preview so I can click on cells and sheets to inspect them.

promptGuides.title: Create a formal report
promptGuides.description: Create a Word document with TOC, headers, footers, page numbers.
promptGuides.prompt: Create a formal report called annual-report.docx. Add a title page with 'Annual Report 2025', a table of contents, 3 sections with headings and body text, headers with page numbers, and a footer with the company name.

promptGuides.title: Create meeting minutes
promptGuides.description: Create a Word document for meeting minutes.
promptGuides.prompt: Create meeting-minutes.docx with a header 'Meeting Minutes', date, attendees list, agenda items, discussion points, and action items with owners and deadlines.

promptGuides.title: Create a proposal
promptGuides.description: Create a Word proposal document.
promptGuides.prompt: Create proposal.docx with sections: Executive Summary, Problem Statement, Proposed Solution, Timeline, Budget, and Conclusion. Use professional formatting with headings and bullet points.

promptGuides.title: Create a contract
promptGuides.description: Create a Word contract or agreement.
promptGuides.prompt: Create contract.docx with sections: Parties, Scope of Work, Payment Terms, Timeline, Confidentiality, Termination, and Signatures. Use formal language and proper formatting.

promptGuides.title: Create a resume
promptGuides.description: Create a professional resume in Word.
promptGuides.prompt: Create resume.docx with sections: Contact Info, Summary, Experience (3 jobs), Education, Skills, and Certifications. Use clean formatting with consistent fonts.

promptGuides.title: Create a pitch deck
promptGuides.description: Create a startup pitch deck in PowerPoint.
promptGuides.prompt: Create pitch-deck.pptx with 10 slides: Title, Problem, Solution, Market Size, Business Model, Traction, Team, Financials, Ask, and Contact. Use a dark theme with professional colors.

promptGuides.title: Create a quarterly review
promptGuides.description: Create a quarterly business review presentation.
promptGuides.prompt: Create qbr.pptx with slides: Title, Agenda, Key Metrics, Revenue Breakdown, Customer Growth, Product Updates, Challenges, Next Quarter Goals. Add charts for revenue and customer data.

promptGuides.title: Create a product launch deck
promptGuides.description: Create a product launch presentation.
promptGuides.prompt: Create product-launch.pptx with slides: Title, Product Overview, Key Features (3 slides), Demo, Pricing, Market Opportunity, Competitive Analysis, Call to Action. Use modern design with images.

promptGuides.title: Create a training deck
promptGuides.description: Create a training or onboarding presentation.
promptGuides.prompt: Create training.pptx with slides: Title, Agenda, Company Overview, Role Description, Tools & Systems, Processes, Best Practices, Q&A. Add speaker notes to each slide.

promptGuides.title: Create a presentation with charts
promptGuides.description: Create a PowerPoint with data visualization.
promptGuides.prompt: Create dashboard.pptx with slides containing: a bar chart for monthly revenue, a pie chart for market share, a line chart for growth trends, and a table summarizing key metrics.

promptGuides.title: Create a budget tracker
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel budget spreadsheet.
promptGuides.prompt: Create budget.xlsx with sheets: Income (salary, investments, other), Expenses (housing, food, transport, utilities, entertainment), and Summary with totals, formulas for each category, and a net income calculation.

promptGuides.title: Create a sales dashboard
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel sales dashboard with charts.
promptGuides.prompt: Create sales-dashboard.xlsx with raw data sheet (100 rows of sales data with columns: Date, Product, Region, Amount, Units), a pivot table, and charts for revenue by region and monthly trends.

promptGuides.title: Create a pivot table
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel pivot table from data.
promptGuides.prompt: Read data.xlsx, then create a pivot table on a new sheet that summarizes sales by Region and Product, with totals and percentages.

promptGuides.title: Create a gradebook
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel gradebook with formulas.
promptGuides.prompt: Create gradebook.xlsx with columns: Student Name, Assignment 1-5, Midterm, Final, Total (weighted formula), Grade (letter), and conditional formatting for pass/fail.

promptGuides.title: Create a financial model
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel financial model.
promptGuides.prompt: Create financial-model.xlsx with sheets: Assumptions, Revenue Projections (5 years), Cost Structure, P&L Statement, Cash Flow, and Summary with key metrics and charts.

promptGuides.title: Create a project tracker
promptGuides.description: Create an Excel project tracker.
promptGuides.prompt: Create project-tracker.xlsx with columns: Task, Owner, Start Date, End Date, Status, Priority, Progress %. Add conditional formatting for status colors and a summary dashboard.

promptGuides.title: Edit Word tables
promptGuides.description: Add and format tables in a Word document.
promptGuides.prompt: Read report.docx, then add a 4x4 table after the first paragraph with headers: Category, Q1, Q2, Q3. Add data rows and format the header row bold with a blue background.

promptGuides.title: Add images to Word
promptGuides.description: Add images and captions to a Word document.
promptGuides.prompt: Read report.docx, then add an image called chart.png after the second paragraph. Add a caption below the image: 'Figure 1: Revenue Growth'.

promptGuides.title: Add comments to Word
promptGuides.description: Add comments and track changes.
promptGuides.prompt: Read draft.docx, then add comments to paragraphs that need revision. Add a comment 'Please expand this section' to the third paragraph.

promptGuides.title: Add animations to PPT
promptGuides.description: Add animations and transitions to slides.
promptGuides.prompt: Read deck.pptx, then add a fade-in animation to the title shape on slide 1, a fly-in animation to the bullet points on slide 2, and a morph transition between all slides.

promptGuides.title: Rearrange PPT slides
promptGuides.description: Move, clone, and rearrange slides.
promptGuides.prompt: Read deck.pptx, then clone slide 1 and move it to the end. Change the title of the cloned slide to 'Thank You'.

promptGuides.title: Add formulas to Excel
promptGuides.description: Add formulas and calculations.
promptGuides.prompt: Read data.xlsx, then add a SUM formula in the total row, an AVERAGE formula for each column, and conditional formatting to highlight cells above 1000.

promptGuides.title: Add charts to Excel
promptGuides.description: Create charts from spreadsheet data.
promptGuides.prompt: Read data.xlsx, then create a bar chart showing revenue by month, a pie chart showing market share by product, and a line chart showing growth trends.

promptGuides.title: Sort and filter Excel data
promptGuides.description: Sort and filter spreadsheet data.
promptGuides.prompt: Read data.xlsx, then sort the data by column C in descending order. Add an autofilter to the header row.

promptGuides.title: Preview and click to edit
promptGuides.description: Start live preview, click elements, and edit them.
promptGuides.prompt: Start a live preview of my document. After I click on an element, get the selected element and change its color to red.

promptGuides.title: Preview a Word document
promptGuides.description: Start live preview of a Word document for visual editing.
promptGuides.prompt: Start a live preview of report.docx. I want to click on paragraphs and tables to inspect their formatting and make changes.

promptGuides.title: Preview an Excel spreadsheet
promptGuides.description: Start live preview of an Excel spreadsheet.
promptGuides.prompt: Start a live preview of data.xlsx. I want to click on cells and sheets to inspect their values and formulas.

promptGuides.title: Bulk edit Word document
promptGuides.description: Find and replace text across a Word document.
promptGuides.prompt: Read report.docx, then find all instances of 'draft' and replace with 'final'. Also bold all instances of 'important'.

promptGuides.title: Bulk edit PowerPoint
promptGuides.description: Apply changes across multiple slides.
promptGuides.prompt: Read deck.pptx, then change the font to Arial and size to 24pt on all shapes across all slides. Add a company logo to the bottom-right of each slide.
